title: Chaetocyperus setaceus
taxonomy: Chaetocyperus setaceus is classified in the following manner: it belongs to the division Chlorophyta, class Ulvophyceae, order Ulvales, family Ulvaceae, and genus Chaetocyperus. intro: Chaetocyperus setaceus, also known as sea grape or sea grape algae, is a type of marine red alga that belongs to the family Xylariaceae.
